# Salem Tailors

> Bespoke African tailoring in Lusaka — chitenge wear, suits, bags, caps and alterations. Book a fitting or shop the catalogue online.

Salem Tailors is a Lusaka-based atelier handcrafting custom garments and bags. Customers can book appointments (consultation, measurement, fitting, pickup), browse a catalogue of ready-to-wear and accessories, and chat with the shop on WhatsApp.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Services, story, contact, and how to book.
- [Catalogue](/catalogue): Bags, caps, fabrics and ready-to-wear by Salem Tailors.
- [Book an appointment](/book): Schedule a consultation, measurement, fitting or pickup.
